allow:
Bash(git commit -m "Add RAG Chatbot with Avenga Design

- Custom Avenga brand design with Haffer & Reckless fonts
- Cloudflare Worker backend with Claude AI
- Supabase vector database integration
- Production-ready deployment configuration")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Disable RAG - Simplify to Claude-only Chatbot

Problem: Embedding APIs (HuggingFace, Supabase AI) unstable/deprecated
Solution: Disable RAG completely, direct Claude integration

Changes:
- Remove all embedding logic (HuggingFace, OpenAI, Supabase)
- Chatbot now works directly with Claude Sonnet 4
- Simplified system prompt (no context injection)
- Clean, stable, production-ready

RAG can be re-enabled later with stable solution (e.g. OpenAI embeddings)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add AIvenga Financial Expert System Prompt

Transform chatbot into AIvenga - a certified financial expert for:
- Banking & Neo-Banking (interest rates, payment services)
- Trading & Investment (ETFs, stocks, crypto, market trends)
- Insurance (retirement planning, life insurance, risk coverage)

Features:
- Expert knowledge with simple, relatable explanations
- Uses everyday comparisons for complex financial concepts
- Includes proper disclaimers (no financial advice)
- Interactive elements (tables, cards, button groups)
- Conversational and trustworthy tone

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix GitHub Pages Build - Remove Git Submodules

Problem: GitHub Pages build failed due to broken submodules
- .agents/skills/superpowers
- Avenga-Labs
- Conversional AI

Solution: Remove submodule references from git index
This fixes the build pipeline and allows GitHub Pages to deploy correctly.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
UI/UX Improvements: Remove Burger Menu, Enhanced Chat History

Changes:
1. System Prompt: Minimize emoji usage (only for graphs, warnings)
2. Remove burger menu from header (no longer needed)
3. Remove simple history list in sidebar
4. New: Full chat history per session in sidebar
   - Shows complete message flow per chat
   - User/AIvenga role indicators
   - Message previews (100 chars)
   - Timestamps (relative time)
   - All stored locally (localStorage)

UX Improvements:
- Cleaner header (removed toggle button)
- Better overview of past conversations
- No server-side storage needed
- Session-based chat tracking

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
